---
title: "RKMA Market Research Handbook Series"
page-layout: article
---

# RKMA Market Research Handbook Series

## Description

Downloadable market research handbooks covering consumer behavior, media, travel, retail, food, healthcare, sports, and related sectors. Supports industry and market analysis.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Health & Medicine, Business & Economics, News & Media
- **Data/resource type:** Market Research, Health & Biomedical Data
- **Access model:** Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Market Research, Health & Biomedical Data

## Links

- [Access resource](http://yale.idm.oclc.org/login?url=http://www.rkma.com/yale/archive/)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
